name: Abater Foundation
description: Abater Foundation is a non-profit advancing open networking and SONiC adoption in research and community settings.

name: Alibaba
description: Alibaba Group is a hyperscaler and one of the earliest large-scale deployers of SONiC across its global data-center fabric.

name: Aria Networks
description: Aria Networks provides AI-driven network automation and optimization solutions compatible with SONiC environments.

name: Arista Networks
description: Arista Networks delivers cloud networking solutions and actively contributes to the SONiC ecosystem.

name: Asterfusion Data Technologies
description: Asterfusion designs white-box switches running SONiC, targeting cloud and data-center operators seeking open-networking alternatives.

name: Aviz Networks
description: Aviz Networks delivers vendor-agnostic SONiC solutions including the ONES orchestration suite, Network Copilot, and Fabric Test Automation Suite (FTAS).

name: BDBOS
description: BDBOS is the German federal authority for digital radio for public safety, exploring SONiC for sovereign open-network infrastructure.

name: BE Networks
description: BE Networks delivers enhanced open-networking solutions based on SONiC for enterprise customers.

name: Broadcom
description: Broadcom provides the silicon (Trident, Tomahawk, Jericho families) underpinning the majority of SONiC-capable switches worldwide.

name: Celestica
description: Celestica designs and manufactures open white-box switches (DS/ES series) that run SONiC and are validated by multiple ecosystem partners.

name: Cisco Systems
description: Cisco supports SONiC on its Nexus and Silicon One platforms and has invested in the SONiC ecosystem.

name: CMKL University
description: CMKL University (Thailand) uses SONiC for research and academic networking, contributing to the next generation of open-networking engineers.

name: Dell Technologies
description: Dell offers its PowerSwitch portfolio with full SONiC support and is a key hardware vendor validated across multiple SONiC distributions.

name: Denvr Dataworks
description: Denvr Dataworks operates GPU-as-a-service cloud infrastructure leveraging SONiC for high-performance AI fabric networking.

name: Dorado Software
description: Dorado Software provides network management and analytics tools that integrate with SONiC-based open-networking environments.

name: Edgecore Networks
description: Edgecore Networks is a leading ODM for open white-box switches from 1G to 800G, offering platforms certified to run SONiC distributions.

name: EPFL
description: EPFL is a leading Swiss technical university researching programmable networks and SONiC-based infrastructure.

name: Google
description: Google uses SONiC extensively in its global network infrastructure and is an active contributor to the upstream open-source project.

name: Hedgehog
description: Hedgehog builds the Open Network Fabric, a Kubernetes-native open-source networking platform powered by SONiC for edge and distributed-cloud environments.

name: iA Cloud
description: iA Cloud is a South Korean cloud and networking solutions provider contributing to SONiC adoption in Asia-Pacific enterprise markets.

name: Juniper Networks
description: Juniper Networks integrates SONiC support into its QFX switching portfolio and participates in the SONiC Foundation as a General Member.

name: Larch Networks
description: Larch Networks delivers disaggregated networking solutions and professional services for SONiC-based data-center deployments.

name: Marvell Technology
description: Marvell provides ASIC silicon (Prestera, Teralynx) with full SAI/SONiC support for multi-vendor open-networking deployments.

name: Micas Networks
description: Micas Networks manufactures open white-box switches from 1G to 800G validated with SONiC, targeting hyperscale and enterprise fabrics.

name: Microsoft
description: Microsoft created SONiC for Azure data centers in 2016 and open-sourced it, seeding the global community that now powers the SONiC Foundation.

name: Netweb Technologies
description: Netweb Technologies is an Indian IT infrastructure company expanding SONiC adoption across the South Asian enterprise market.

name: Nexthop AI
description: Nexthop AI builds AI-native networking solutions leveraging SONiC for hyperscale and enterprise AI infrastructure deployments.

name: Nokia
description: Nokia joined the SONiC Foundation as a Premier Member and integrates SONiC into its open-networking and IP/optical portfolio.

name: NVIDIA
description: NVIDIA Spectrum ASICs ship with full SONiC support and NVIDIA actively drives RoCEv2/AI fabric features for large-scale GPU clusters.

name: PalCNetworks
description: PalCNetworks delivers networking solutions and integration services built on open platforms including SONiC.

name: PANTHEON.tech
description: PANTHEON.tech is a European open-networking software company offering SONiC expertise services and the SandWork network orchestration platform.

name: PLVision
description: PLVision specialises in custom SONiC distributions, SAI Challenger testing, and end-to-end SONiC integration for OEMs, ODMs, and enterprises.

name: STORDIS
description: STORDIS is The Open Networking Expert, distributing Enterprise SONiC and providing MONSOON monitoring, SONiC bootcamps, and Open2Support SLAs.

name: Sumitomo Electric Industry
description: Sumitomo Electric brings optical and network hardware expertise to the SONiC ecosystem, supporting open-networking adoption globally.

name: University of Rome Tor Vergata
description: The University of Rome Tor Vergata conducts networking research leveraging SONiC for academic and experimental deployments.

name: Upscale AI
description: Upscale AI delivers AI-optimized network infrastructure solutions built on SONiC for next-generation AI data centers.
